name: stitch-ai-ui-ux-designer
description: Design-first Codex plugin for UI concepts, UX flows, audits, and implementation-ready frontend direction.

interface.shortDescription: Design sharper interfaces and user flows inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: A design-focused Codex plugin for turning rough ideas into intentional UI direction, UX flows, audits, and implementation-ready frontend guidance.
defaultPrompt: Design a polished landing page for my product.
Audit this UI for UX, hierarchy, and accessibility gaps.
Turn this feature idea into a mobile app user flow.
